display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: 知识库管理页 / API 调用方

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService.preprocess_preview
1. 校验 chunk 参数
2. 解析 source_path 实际位置
3. 非首版类型直接走 warning preview
4. 支持类型执行 load -> process -> preview

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService.register_document
1. 校验 chunk 参数
2. 解析 source_path 实际位置
3. load 原始记录
4. publish_new_version

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService.reprocess_document
1. 读取活动文档记录
2. 重新加载源文件
3. 使用新 processing_rules 执行 publish_new_version

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentApplicationService.rechunk_document
1. 读取活动文档记录
2. 重新加载源文件
3. 沿用活动版本 processing_rules
4. 执行 publish_new_version

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentQueryService.list_file_indexes
1. 扫描受管文件
2. 可处理未入库文件标记 awaiting_processing
3. pdf/docx/xlsx 标记 unsupported 并返回 warning

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
load_document_records
按 json/csv/txt/md 读取原始 DocumentRecord

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
process_document_records
normalize -> apply rules -> stats/warnings/samples -> ProcessedDocumentRecord

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
build_document_chunks
仅消费 ProcessedDocumentRecord
生成 provenance 完整的 chunk metadata

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
KnowledgeDocumentPublisher.publish_new_version
1. 生成 document_id / document_version
2. 写入新 chunk
3. 切换主记录到新版本
4. 失活旧活动 chunk

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
document record
source_type / processing_rules / processing_stats / provenance_enabled / versions

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
chunk store
source_record_index / applied_rules / raw_content_hash / processed_content_hash / is_active

div.style: color: rgb(127, 29, 29) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
失败回滚
1. 恢复旧主记录
2. 恢复旧活动 chunk
3. 首次失败写 failed record
4. 清理新写入 chunk
